tech.headline: Chinese Scientists Boost Kesterite Solar Cell Efficiency Using Potassium Fluoride

The research focused on enhancing the cell's performance through these specific chemical treatments to optimize the overall interface properties of the device.

learn.title: Demand Response Explained
learn.intro: Balancing the grid is crucial for reliable power. Demand response lets big users adjust their energy use, helping avoid blackouts.
learn.c1_text: Understanding demand response helps large consumers support stability in renewable-heavy grids.
learn.c2_text: Rooftop solar plus net metering lets homeowners credit excess power, reducing strain on the network.
learn.c3_text: India has 90 GW solar installed, showing strong adoption of rooftop systems.
learn.stat2: Over 60% of new solar projects use net metering policies
learn.stat3: India aims for 500 GW renewables by 2030

learn.title: Power Purchase Agreements
learn.intro: RE projects need funding. PPAs secure contracts for selling clean energy to buyers.
learn.c1_text: PPAs are essential for turning solar and wind projects into profitable assets.
learn.c2_text: India uses PPAs to attract investors and ensure steady revenue streams.
learn.stat2: Approximately 20% of Indian solar farms use long-term PPAs
learn.stat3: National Solar Mission targets 500 GW by 2030
learn.stat4: India's solar capacity grew from 20 GW to 70 GW in five years

learn.intro: Small turbines provide local power. They work quietly and fit community needs.

learn.c2_text: Wind turbines reduce reliance on fossil fuels in village and town areas.

learn.stat3: India aims for 50 GW wind capacity by 2030
learn.stat4: Small turbines average 1-3 kW per unit installed

learn.title: Lithium-Ion Battery Storage Function
learn.intro: Batteries store energy for grids. They help balance supply and demand.
learn.c1_text: Lithium-ion batteries absorb excess power and release it when needed.
